rules_primary: If Scottie Barnes records 2+ Three Pointers in the Cleveland at Toronto professional basketball game originally scheduled for May 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Cleveland at Toronto professional basketball game originally scheduled for May 1, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's threes recorded.
